nasb.text: Why did you flee secretly and deceive me, and did not tell me so that I might have sent you away with joy and with songs, with timbrel and with lyre;

esv.text: Why did you flee secretly and trick me, and did not tell me, so that I might have sent you away with mirth and songs, with tambourine and lyre?

cnv.text: 你為甚麼暗中逃走，瞞著我不讓我知道，使我可以歡歡喜喜地唱歌、擊鼓、彈琴給你送行呢？

ccb.text: 你为什么要偷偷地溜走？你为什么不告诉我，我好击鼓、弹琴、唱歌欢送你？

csbs.text: 你为什么偷偷逃走，欺瞒我，不告诉我？不然我可以唱歌、击鼓、弹琴来欢送你。
